worktree_state.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://e-menum.net/schemas/module-v1.json",
  "id": "kitchen-display",
  "name": "Kitchen Display Module",
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "status": "stub",
  "description": "Mutfak ekranı sistemi (KDS) - sipariş takibi, hazırlık yönetimi ve zamanlama",

  "type": "feature",
  "category": "operations",

  "author": {
    "name": "E-Menum Team",
    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
  },

  "compatibility": {
    "platform": ">=1.0.0",
    "node": ">=20.0.0"
  },

  "dependencies": {
    "modules": ["auth", "organization", "order"],
    "optional": ["notification", "analytics"]
  },

  "provides": {
    "services": ["IKitchenDisplayService", "IOrderQueueService"],
    "events": [
      "kds.order_received",
      "kds.order_started",
      "kds.order_ready",
      "kds.order_delayed",
      "kds.station_alert"
    ],
    "permissions": [
      "kds:view",
      "kds:operate",
      "kds:configure",
      "kds:manage_stations"
    ]
  },

  "tier": {
    "minimum": "professional",
    "features": {
      "professional": ["basic_display", "order_queue"],
      "business": ["basic_display", "order_queue", "multiple_stations", "timing", "alerts"],
      "enterprise": ["basic_display", "order_queue", "multiple_stations", "timing", "alerts", "analytics", "custom_workflows"]
    }
  },

  "plannedFeatures": [
    "Real-time order display",
    "Multi-station support",
    "Order timing and alerts",
    "Bump bar integration",
    "Priority ordering",
    "Cook time tracking",
    "Kitchen performance analytics",
    "Custom display layouts",
    "Audio alerts"
  ],

  "estimatedRelease": "Q3 2026"
}
